title: Culture of bone marrow stromal cells and mesenchymal stem cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"13eb0","text":"A bone marrow aspirate was obtained from equine ilium, and mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) were separated from the aspirate by density-gradient centrifugation (Ficoll-Hypaque gradient centrifugation) (GE Healthcare, Pittsburgh, PA, USA) and further cultured.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Michiyo Tsuru
